function.name: list_available_tasks
function.description: Returns only tasks that are free to claim right now (unclaimed or expired lease). Optional filters by column slug or label slug.

label.description: Label slug filter; task must have this label.

function.name: claim_task
function.description: Claim a task by id. If already_claimed, do NOT retry the same task — pick a different one from list_available_tasks.

function.name: heartbeat_task
function.description: Renew the lease on a claimed task. Call periodically during long work. If lease_lost, STOP — another agent owns it now.

function.name: complete_task
function.description: Marks the task done and releases the lease. Optionally leave a short trace describing what was done.

result_note.description: Optional completion note appended to the card.

function.name: release_task
function.description: Give the task back unfinished so another agent can take it.

function.name: post_trace
function.description: Leave a new task/marker on the board for any agent (including yourself) to pick up later.

title.description: Short title for the new card.
